/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsensor__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libsensor__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/sensor__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sensor/msg/detail/workload_msg__description.c.o CMakeFiles/sensor__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sensor/msg/detail/workload_msg__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/sensor__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/sensor/msg/detail/workload_msg__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
